title: Used RTX 3090 Purchase Decision
dilemma: Should I buy 2 used RTX 3090 GPUs now, or should I wait?
time_horizon: Need useful compute capacity in the next 3 to 6 months
constraints: Cards must be stable for AI workloads, manageable power draw, no major maintenance surprises
existing_context: I want local GPUs for AI experimentation and model fine tuning, but I am worried about used hardware wear, electricity cost, and new GPU launches.
alternatives_considered: Wait for price drops, buy one card now, or buy a newer but less VRAM-rich GPU later
